summary: Backend smoke test iteration 1: all 23 backend endpoint checks passed against the public API URL. Auth, users, follow/unfollow, video upload (with Emergent Object Storage), feed, per-user videos, likes, comments, services CRUD, orders, Stripe checkout (real test URL returned), payment status, and explore creators are all working.
passed: POST /api/videos/upload with multipart file (field name 'file', form field 'category') - stored via Emergent Object Storage, returns video with populated creator
GET /api/videos/feed returns list with creator + liked flag; newly uploaded video appears
POST /api/orders creates order in pending_payment; GET /api/orders/my returns as_client/as_creator
POST /api/payments/checkout creates real Stripe test session (checkout.stripe.com URL)
action_items: Note for main agent: video upload endpoint expects multipart field name 'file' (not 'video') and form field 'category' (not 'hashtags'). Confirm frontend Upload page uses these names.

Follow endpoint path is /api/users/{username}/follow (by username, not user id) and response is {"following": bool}. User model exposes 'followers' (not 'followers_count'). Confirm frontend consumes these keys.
